weg_djerba_2020.label: WEG Djerba (2020)
weg_djerba_2020.note: Source indicates the Djerba SWRO plant has 50,000 m3/day capacity, expandable to 75,000 m3/day.

world_bank_2026_zarat.label: World Bank (2026) – Zarat
world_bank_2026_zarat.note: Source indicates the Zarat expansion would increase capacity from 50,000 to 100,000 m3/day, serving Gabès, Médenine, and Tataouine.
